templates.name: parts_list
templates.notes: Dominant template. 16 raw signatures but all share QTY + PART NUMBER + DESCRIPTION + MANUFACTURER core. Variations are column order and optional columns.

templates.name: cable_table
templates.notes: Cable interconnect tables. No part/qty data useful for installed_base. SKIP for denominator extraction.

templates.name: drawing_index
templates.notes: Index of as-built drawing sheets. No part/qty data. SKIP for denominator extraction.

parser_recommendation.strategy: Header-sniff dispatch with 2 active templates + 2 skip rules
parser_recommendation.detect_parts_list: Row contains PART NUMBER AND (QTY or QTY.)
parser_recommendation.detect_cable_table: Row contains SOCKET or CABLE DESCRIPTION -> skip
parser_recommendation.qty_extraction: Find column named QTY or QTY. (case-insensitive)
parser_recommendation.serial_extraction: Find column named SERIAL NO. or SERIAL NUMBER or Serial Number

key_finding: As-Built xlsx files are 80%+ Parts Lists with a universal QTY + PART NUMBER + DESCRIPTION + MANUFACTURER core. Only 2 outlier types (cable tables, drawing indexes) need skip rules. Agent-C can reuse the same header-sniff approach from Site Inventory with minor column-name variations.
